query:
-- 查询DC-001-GRY-V001批次的价格数据
SELECT vp.*, pv.variantCode, pv.variantName
FROM variant_pricing vp
JOIN product_variants pv ON vp.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V001';
